[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011010000 3
1 0010001001 3
2 0000000000 a
3 1000100110 4
4 0000101010 3
5 0011000000 2
6 0010111100 5
7 1000100110 4

01 10 1000110010 4
12 21 1011001001 5
23 32 0011001000 3
34 43 0001100100 3
45 54 0000100010 2
56 65 0000000000 a match 2
67 76 0010010000 2
70 07 0000110100 3

02 20 1000000000 1
13 31 0011111000 5
24 42 1101000000 3
35 53 0000101000 2
46 64 0001000000 1
57 75 0000101000 2
60 06 0000010000 1
71 17 0010111001 5

03 30 0000110100 3
14 41 1001100010 4
25 52 0000001000 1
36 63 0011010000 3 match 0
47 74 0000100100 2
50 05 0000100010 2
61 16 0011010000 3 match 0
72 27 0010001001 3 match 1

04 40 1000100110 4 match 3 7
15 51 0000101010 3 match 4
26 62 0011000000 2 match 5
37 73 0010111100 5 match 6
